workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Entry workflow plus a family-specific reusable apply-in workflow and script-backed manifest, hash, path, and workflow-change validation.
workflow_contracts.rollback: Restore the prior inline apply-in workflow body and keep old helper scripts until happy-path and failure-path readback pass.
workflow_contracts.acceptance_evidence: Happy-path and failure-path run readback, committed report, artifact behavior, stale-write/hash/path/workflow-change gate evidence.

workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Entry workflow plus a family-specific reusable exec workflow and script-backed approval, secret-name-only, artifact, cleanup, and report handling.
workflow_contracts.rollback: Restore the prior inline exec workflow body and request cleanup behavior.
workflow_contracts.acceptance_evidence: Approval gate, secret-name-only bridging, sanitized report behavior, artifact retention, request cleanup, and live heartbeat readback.

workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Entry workflow plus a family-specific reusable stage-out workflow and script-backed request and bundle validation.
workflow_contracts.rollback: Restore the prior inline stage-out workflow body and bundle/report path behavior.

workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Entry workflow plus a family-specific reusable cleanup workflow and script-backed cleanup planner.
workflow_contracts.rollback: Restore prior inline cleanup workflow and keep previous cleanup scripts until scoped deletion evidence passes.
workflow_contracts.acceptance_evidence: Dry-run, scoped deletion, latest-report preservation, evidence-retention, and cleanup report readback.

workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Family-specific reusable retention cleanup workflow plus script-backed retention policy.
